meta.name: Magneta Layer 1 ownership migration — polygon
meta.description: Sentinelle config-drift scanner finding remediation 2026-06-08. Completes the Ownable2Step second leg for polygon: Safe accepts ownership of Gateway (0x7b1A44FA3928d61E04e8C04E6798DEe1c3d5f66C), LPModule (0x864Eed1d5DF4b8457bfb42aBee1468127D315539), and TokenOpsModule (0xfB95B039c6Cd2Dfbf94D3e849D16Fc333B27c0C6). Eliminates single-key risk on polygon's Layer 1 ops (LP / MINT / FREEZE) — they were previously deployer-EOA-owned out of step with the other 17 mainnet chains. Sign with Safe 0x4AeA3A398Db41b45e146c08131aD27c75b02EC2F.
